operators.name: RECON
operators.description: Outbound lead research agent. Searches the web autonomously, extracts structured contact data, and writes results to CSV. Runs continuously on a configurable interval.

operators.name: SCOUT
operators.description: Inbound lead capture and qualification engine. Embeds a chat widget on any webpage. Qualifies leads via conversation and routes them into the Zyrcon workflow engine.

operators.name: QUOTE
operators.description: Proposal and RFQ generator. Parses scope documents and generates professional, branded proposals in under 5 minutes. Includes pricing engine and template system.

operators.name: CHIEF
operators.description: Executive intelligence briefing agent. Pulls live data from all active operators and delivers a 90-second morning brief with anomalies and ranked actions.

operators.name: Aurelia
operators.description: Personal executive assistant. Tracks commitments, surfaces the priority stack, preps meeting packets, manages delegation ledger, and generates weekly CEO reports.

operators.name: Debrief
operators.description: Post-call intelligence logger. Extracts action items, commitments, appointments, and follow-up drafts from raw call notes. Zero open items slip through.

operators.name: Competition Researcher
operators.description: Competitive intelligence agent. Researches competitors in real time, finds strengths and weaknesses, and produces daily intelligence reports with strategic recommendations.

operators.name: Jr. Programmer
operators.description: Software development assistant. Writes code, breaks down architecture, tests iteratively, and improves existing code until the goal is achieved.

operators.name: Social
operators.description: Conversational campaign review interface. Generates posts, presents approval cards, handles edits and QC.
